manifest.name: Graphs

name: Graphs

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Changed graph div id to fix not rendering in read mode

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Added `graph3d` code block which provides better defaults for 3D graphs
* Fixed SVG export encoding issue

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Fixed export graphs not showing graphs on mobile
* Fixed PNG export failing

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Updated to JSXGraph 1.1.0
	* new `text3d` type
* Added PNG option for exports
* Added `contrast` color option for attributes
	* Is black on light theme and black on dark theme
* Reduced startup time
* Various fixes for O_O 2024

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Added `Export graphs` command
	* Have to be in read mode
* Added settings for exporting graphs
	* Default location
	* Transparent background
* Added custom function parameters
	* Can change function variable names
	* `f(a,b,c):`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Improved syntax highlighting
* Fixed live preview bug where graphs would not render

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Added post install script fixing JSXGraph bugs
* Added theming to `axis3d`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes
* `bounds3d` out of outside of view
* `view3d` theming not being applied
* `anchor` throwing error

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed release version.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Added syntax highlighting to `graph` codeblock
*  Added support for 3D graphs with the `bounds3d` attribute on the board
* 3D elements
	* circle3d
	* curve3d
	* functiongraph3d
	* line3d
	* parametricsurface3d
	* plane3d
	* point3d
	* polygon3d
	* sphere3d
	* vectorfield3d

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Upgraded JSXGraph to 1.9.2
* Added settings page for the plugin
	* height pixels
	* width pixels
	* alignment
		* left
		* center
		* right
* Added per graph settings
	* height pixels
	* width pixels 
* Fixed riemannsum type bug

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* added support for MathJax
	* allows LaTeX math to be used within text and label elements
	* to use LaTeX wrap it in dollar signs to mark it as inline math `$text$`
	* to use LaTeX commands you have to use two back slashes `$\\vec{v}$`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * removed log statements that were accidentally left in

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* updated to JSXGraph 1.8.0
	* new axis attributes 
		* `position: "fixed"`
		* `position: "sticky"`
		* `anchor: "left"`
		* `anchor: "right"`
		* `anchor: "right left"`
		* `label: {toFraction: true}`
* added board attributes
	* `drag: false`
	* `maxBoundingBox: [-10, 10, 10, -10]`
	* `defaultAxes: { x: {}, y: {}}`
* enabled browser pan to make scrolling easier on mobile
* bug fixes
	* fixed live preview bug where graphs would be broken
	* fixed startup bug where some graphs would not get rendered when first starting Obsidian

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * fixed bug with live preview mode causing SVG path to be wrong in read mode

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * reduced memory usage by deleting graphs from non-active files

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* fixed composing elements inside of functions bug
* added segment element

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * point now shows info box when hovered over

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* no longer need to prefix JavaScript math functions with `Math.`
	*  example `Math.sin(x)` can be written as `sin(x)`
* added support for slope fields, vector fields, and slope triangle
* changed how functions and composed elements are checked to make sure that arrays within arrays are checked
*  basic color names such as red, yellow, green, etc. will use their respective Obsidian theme variables for the color

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* added support for Obsidian themes
* graphs now are colored according to Obsidian CSS variables

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* added axis as an option for the graph
* fixed elements in functions

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* updated JSXGraph to 1.7.0
* updated README.md

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* replaced `eval()` with `new Function()`
* replaced markdown post processor with code block post processor
* removed setting options
* fixed composition of multiple elements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed manifest  for obsidian integration.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Initial release with graphing  capabilities through YAML.
